authoritative_references: amule-official; emule-official-0.50a; mldonkey-official; wireshark-official; protocol-docs
current_aria2_next_surface: docs/maintenance/ed2k references older disallowed projects
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Use only the current authoritative local references. Treat the older tracker as historical because its completion claim was disproven by live interoperability behavior.
user_visible_impact: Future work stops depending on stale or disallowed reference assumptions.

authoritative_references: protocol-docs ED2K client/server and client/client flow; aMule/eMule runtime behavior
current_aria2_next_surface: Draft implementation can parse links, create tasks, connect servers, discover sources, and sometimes reach peer hello/eMule-info exchange, but public peer transfer still stalls at zero bytes.
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Keep using controlled short live runs plus local peer fixtures. Treat public single-source runs as nondeterministic when LowID and stale peers prevent reaching the same packet boundary twice.
user_visible_impact: Refactor work targets observed packet boundaries instead of speculative features.

authoritative_references: aMule ED2KLink; eMule ED2KLink; protocol-docs aMule-Ed2k_link
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_link.* parses file links, names, size, MD4, part hashes, AICH, and inline sources
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Verify file link parsing and serialization for safe filenames, MD4 file hash, part hashes, AICH root, inline sources, source user hash, and source crypt options. Keep aria2-next percent-decoding and path safety stronger than legacy clients where appropriate.
user_visible_impact: Users can add file links without losing metadata or accepting unsafe output names.

authoritative_references: aMule ED2KLink; eMule ED2KLink; protocol-docs aMule-Ed2k_link
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_link.* supports server, serverlist, and nodeslist link types
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Verify server links, serverlist URLs, and nodeslist URLs. Use aria2-next request/session plumbing rather than legacy GUI prompts or auto-update dialogs.
user_visible_impact: Users can import server and Kad bootstrap data through normal aria2-next task/session paths.

authoritative_references: aMule ServerList and Server; eMule ServerListCtrl and Server; MLDonkey donkeyInteractive and donkeyServers
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_server.* parses server.met metadata into ED2K server endpoints and states
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Audit version handling, IP/port fields, tag parsing, duplicate server merge, unknown tags, malformed files, compressed/downloaded server.met inputs, and persistence. Adapt parser behavior to safe aria2-next inputs without implementing GUI update history.
user_visible_impact: Server lists load reliably without poisoning server state or depending on legacy UI behavior.

authoritative_references: aMule Kad contacts; eMule Kademlia routing zone; MLDonkey donkeyNodesDat and donkeyOvernet
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_kad.* and Ed2kKadState parse and persist routing snapshots
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Audit nodes.dat headers, contact ID/IP/UDP/TCP/version fields, Kad version variants, malformed input handling, bootstrap merge, and durable routing state. Adapt only classic Kad behavior needed by aria2-next.
user_visible_impact: Kad bootstrap data survives restart and rejects bad contacts safely.

authoritative_references: aMule ServerSocket and ServerUDPSocket; eMule ServerSocket; MLDonkey donkeyServers and donkeyProtoServer; Wireshark packet-edonkey
current_aria2_next_surface: Ed2kCommand server handling and ed2k_server.*
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Implement or correct login, IDChange, HighID/LowID, GetSources, GetSources OBFU, FoundSources, FoundSources OBFU, callback, server status, messages, server list, UDP status, and persisted server state.
user_visible_impact: Server discovery works with modern servers and does not drop valid source formats.

area: Server login IDChange and capability flags
authoritative_references: aMule ServerSocket and Server; eMule ServerSocket and server.h; MLDonkey server state; protocol-docs IDCHANGE; Wireshark server flags
current_aria2_next_surface: Ed2kServerState, Ed2kCommand server login, and persisted server state
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Audit OP_IDCHANGE payload variants, assigned client ID, server-reported IP, HighID/LowID threshold, TCP flags, UDP flags, large-file support, Unicode support, compression support, TCP/UDP obfuscation ports, and unknown flag handling. Persist only state that affects scheduling, source requests, callback, search, or user-visible status.
user_visible_impact: The client can explain and act on LowID, server capability, and obfuscation state instead of treating all server sessions alike.

authoritative_references: aMule DownloadQueue source request scheduling; eMule DownloadQueue OP_GETSOURCES and OP_GETSOURCES_OBFU; protocol-docs GETSOURCES; Wireshark server source requests
current_aria2_next_surface: Ed2kCommand source request payload creation
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Audit ordinary OP_GETSOURCES, OP_GETSOURCES_OBFU, large-file size fields, batched source requests, request throttling, and server capability gating. Send only variants supported by the connected server state and local implementation.
user_visible_impact: Server source discovery stays compatible with older and obfuscation-capable servers.

area: Server UDP source and status variants
authoritative_references: aMule ServerUDPSocket and DownloadQueue; eMule UDPSocket and DownloadQueue; protocol-docs GLOBGETSOURCES and GLOBSERVSTAT; Wireshark UDP server packets
current_aria2_next_surface: Ed2kKadCommand and ED2K UDP helpers share UDP parsing paths
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Audit OP_GLOBGETSOURCES, OP_GLOBGETSOURCES2, OP_GLOBFOUNDSOURCES, compatible server status replies, compressed UDP packets, large-file UDP formats, server UDP flags, and retry/backoff. Keep UDP source discovery only where it fits the existing aria2-next command model.
user_visible_impact: UDP-capable servers can improve discovery without corrupting server state or adding a second UDP subsystem.

authoritative_references: protocol-docs OP_OFFERFILES; aMule server shared-file offer paths; eMule shared-file server publishing; MLDonkey shared file publication
current_aria2_next_surface: Ed2kSharedStore, Ed2kServerState, and server command paths
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Publish completed or imported shared files to connected ED2K servers only when sharing is enabled and metadata is verified. Use aria2-next SharedStore ownership and avoid legacy GUI share-directory prompts or unbounded automatic local file exposure.
user_visible_impact: Shared files can be discoverable through servers without exposing unintended local directories.

authoritative_references: aMule PartFile AddSources and ServerSocket; eMule PartFile AddSources and ServerSocket; Wireshark sourceOBFU dissector; MLDonkey source import paths
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_server.* source parsing, PeerState source labels, and SourceExchangeEntry crypt fields
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Audit ordinary source lists, OBFU source lists, source type, endpoint fields, server endpoint, optional user hash, crypt support/request/require flags, direct callback flags, HighID direct sources, LowID callback sources, malformed counts, duplicate endpoints, and source-count caps.
user_visible_impact: Returned sources are classified correctly before connection attempts, reducing immediate peer resets and silent stalls.

authoritative_references: aMule source OBFU paths; eMule source OBFU paths; Wireshark sourceOBFU dissector
current_aria2_next_surface: SourceExchangeEntry cryptOptions and server source parsing
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Represent obfuscation settings, optional user hash, direct callback bits, and crypt support/request/require flags where they affect source connection behavior. Prune only crypt behavior that is not implemented and must not be advertised.
user_visible_impact: Peers receive accurate connection options and fewer immediate disconnects.

authoritative_references: protocol-docs callback mechanism; aMule/eMule server callback handling; MLDonkey indirect address handling
current_aria2_next_surface: Server state, callback request handling, incoming peer listener
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Support HighID direct peer connections, LowID callback through shared server when possible, and safe failure handling when LowID-to-LowID transfer is impossible or unsupported.
user_visible_impact: LowID users get honest behavior and valid callback paths instead of silent stalls.

authoritative_references: aMule BaseClient callback states and ServerSocket callback packets; eMule BaseClient and ServerSocket callback handling; protocol-docs callback; eMule LowID user-visible errors
current_aria2_next_surface: Ed2kCommand callback request handling, incoming listener, PeerState connection state
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Audit server OP_CALLBACKREQUEST, OP_CALLBACKREQUESTED, OP_CALLBACK_FAIL, direct UDP callback metadata, Kad callback constraints, LowID-to-LowID impossible state, shared-server requirement, timeout handling, and peer state transitions. Prune buddy-only callback ownership unless a native owner model is required by a non-pruned transfer path.
user_visible_impact: LowID behavior becomes deterministic: request callback when possible, skip impossible peers, and report external network boundaries honestly.

authoritative_references: aMule ClientTCPSocket and DownloadClient; eMule ListenSocket and DownloadClient; Wireshark eMule info dissector
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_peer.* and Ed2kCommand hello handling
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Parse, generate, and validate peer hello, hello answer, eMule info, misc options, misc options 2, and server endpoint fields. Advertise only implemented capabilities.
user_visible_impact: Modern peers should not reject aria2-next because it claims unsupported protocol features.

authoritative_references: aMule BaseClient misc option parsing and writing; eMule BaseClient misc options 1 and 2; MLDonkey miscoptions defaults; Wireshark eMule tag dissector
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_peer.* EmuleInfo, EmuleMiscOptions, EmuleMiscOptions2, and local capability constants
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Audit every advertised bit and tag for UDP version, data compression, Source Exchange, extended request, comments, peer cache, Unicode, AICH, multipacket, file identifiers, extended multipacket, large files, Kad, crypt, secure identification, preview, captcha, and shared-view behavior. Keep only truthful capability claims; safely parse or ignore pruned capabilities without advertising them.
user_visible_impact: Peers choose packet flows that aria2-next can actually complete.

authoritative_references: aMule/eMule misc option handling; eMule file identifier and large-file request paths; protocol-docs part and compressed packets
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_peer.*, Ed2kCommand request ranges, ed2k_compression.*, and DownloadContext metadata
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Audit capability claims against implemented send, receive, range validation, disk path, filename encoding, and fallback behavior. Large-file support must include 64-bit request and transfer paths; compression support must include normal and I64 compressed parts; Unicode support must match actual name/tag handling.
user_visible_impact: Capability negotiation remains compatible for both small legacy files and modern large files.

authoritative_references: aMule DownloadClient and ClientTCPSocket; eMule DownloadClient, ListenSocket, FileIdentifier; Wireshark multipacket handling
current_aria2_next_surface: Current constants and handlers do not cover the full modern request flow
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Implement OP_MULTIPACKET, OP_MULTIPACKET_EXT, OP_MULTIPACKET_EXT2, multipacket answer handling where required, and file identifier read/write/compare behavior adapted to aria2-next metadata.
user_visible_impact: Modern aMule/eMule peers can complete the file request handshake.

authoritative_references: aMule DownloadClient and ClientTCPSocket; eMule DownloadClient and ClientTCPSocket; protocol-docs client file request flow
current_aria2_next_surface: Ed2kCommand outgoing request sequence and Ed2kSharedResponder incoming request handling
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Audit plain and extended OP_REQUESTFILENAME, optional extended part status payload, complete-source count, OP_SETREQFILEID skip for single-part files, OP_FILESTATUS, OP_HASHSETREQUEST, OP_STARTUPLOADREQ, OP_ACCEPTUPLOADREQ, OP_QUEUERANKING, source request ordering, AICH request ordering, and failure fallbacks.
user_visible_impact: Peer sessions reach queue or transfer state without being dropped for malformed request order.

authoritative_references: aMule ClientTCPSocket OP_MULTIPACKET and OP_MULTIPACKETANSWER; eMule DownloadClient multipacket ext and ext2; Wireshark eMule multipacket dissector
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_constants.h has partial constants; Ed2kCommand mostly uses plain packets
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Implement or truthfully disable OP_MULTIPACKET, OP_MULTIPACKET_EXT, OP_MULTIPACKET_EXT2, OP_MULTIPACKETANSWER, embedded filename/status/source/AICH requests, file-size-prefixed ext packets, file-identifier-prefixed ext2 packets, and strict post-handshake validation.
user_visible_impact: Clients that prefer modern bundled requests can interoperate without forcing unsupported paths.

authoritative_references: eMule FileIdentifier and KnownFile; aMule file identifier handling; protocol-docs file identity fields

required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Represent the modern file identity as ED2K root hash, file size, optional MD4 hashset, optional AICH root, and compatible relaxed comparison. Use aria2-next metadata ownership rather than importing legacy file databases.
user_visible_impact: Large-file and AICH-aware peers can verify they are discussing the same file before transfer.

authoritative_references: eMule secure identification packets; aMule client credit and secure-ident behavior; Wireshark SEC_IDENT, PUBLIC_KEY, SIGNATURE
current_aria2_next_surface: No complete secure-ident subsystem is evident in current ED2K draft
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Either implement the secure-ident packet flow needed for advertised capabilities or stop advertising it. Prune credit-security behavior only with evidence that file transfer interoperability does not require it.
user_visible_impact: Peer trust and credit behavior remain honest and interoperable.

authoritative_references: aMule EncryptedStreamSocket and EncryptedDatagramSocket; eMule encrypted sockets; Wireshark crypt option fields
current_aria2_next_surface: Current ED2K draft records some crypt options but does not own an encrypted ED2K transport
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Implement only if required for practical peer/server interoperability. Otherwise parse and preserve source metadata but do not advertise crypt support as locally available.
user_visible_impact: Avoids peers selecting an encrypted path that aria2-next cannot complete.

authoritative_references: aMule DownloadClient and ClientTCPSocket; eMule DownloadClient and ListenSocket; MLDonkey donkeyClient and donkeyProtoClient
current_aria2_next_surface: Ed2kCommand peer path now sends extended request filename payloads when advertising extended request version 2, and accepts extended incoming file requests in shared-peer paths.
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Continue implementing file status, hashset, queue rank, accept upload, start upload, part requests, cancel, out-of-parts, no-file, disconnect, failure scoring, reconnect backoff, multipacket variants, and file identifiers in the same order and conditions as reference behavior.
user_visible_impact: Peer sessions should no longer be rejected specifically for sending a short request filename packet after advertising extended requests.

authoritative_references: aMule BaseClient and ClientTCPSocket hashset comments; eMule BaseClient and ClientTCPSocket hashset comments; protocol-docs file status and hashset packets
current_aria2_next_surface: ed2k_peer.* status/hashset helpers and Ed2kCommand request flow
required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Accept valid duplicate or delayed OP_FILESTATUS and OP_HASHSETANSWER packets without corrupting state. Validate hashset count, single-part behavior, requested file identity, and malformed packet sizes before updating piece availability or integrity metadata.
user_visible_impact: Real peers that send delayed or repeated status/hashset packets do not break downloads.

area: Peer transfer control and failure packets
authoritative_references: aMule ClientTCPSocket and DownloadClient transfer states; eMule DownloadClient transfer states; protocol-docs transfer opcodes

required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Audit OP_REQUESTPARTS, OP_REQUESTPARTS_I64, OP_SENDINGPART, OP_SENDINGPART_I64, OP_COMPRESSEDPART, OP_COMPRESSEDPART_I64, OP_OUTOFPARTREQS, OP_CANCELTRANSFER, OP_FILEREQANSNOFIL, disconnect handling, retry scoring, and duplicate request prevention.
user_visible_impact: Failed or unavailable peers back off cleanly, while valid peers can enter data transfer without unsafe writes.

user_visible_impact: Downloaded data is correct and recoverable after restart.

required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Rank and retry sources from server, OBFU, inline link, Source Exchange, Kad, resume, and callback paths with queue state, availability, dead-source backoff, duplicate rejection, and endgame behavior.

required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Support SX1, SX2, SX2 v4, user hash, server endpoint, crypt options, direct callback metadata where supported, and safe merge filtering.

required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Implement nodes.dat loading, bootstrap, hello, routing table, traversal, source search, source publish, keyword search, firewalled checks, refresh, and durable state. Prune obsolete Kad1 or unsupported UI behavior with evidence.

user_visible_impact: Peers see valid queue and accept-upload behavior without a separate bandwidth model.

required_behavior_or_prune_reason: Prune GUI-only and daemon-shell behavior that does not implement ED2K wire interoperability.
